info.name: BOTG API v1.2.0
info.description:
Custom REST API layer for BOTG — hotels, products, and more.

Set the `baseUrl` collection variable to your environment (e.g. `http://localhost:8055` for local).
Set `apiKey` to your Bearer token.

variable.description: Base URL of the Directus instance. Override per environment.
Bearer token — value from global_configurations where entity = botg-api-user-key.
ISO 639-1 language code: de | en | nl | de-CH
Hotel UUID, numeric object_id, or px_source_id

query.description: Full-text search on hotel name (max 200 chars)
Delta sync — return only records updated after this ISO 8601 timestamp

request.description: Returns a minimal paginated list of hotels — only `id`, `object_id`, `name`, and `date_updated`. Use for listing pages and sync operations. No `lang` param needed (no translations in response).

response.name: 200 OK — lightweight list

query.description: ISO 639-1 code (de | en | nl | de-CH). If set, all translations blocks return only that language key.

request.description:
Returns full hotel detail. The `id` path parameter accepts a UUID, numeric object_id, or px_source_id.

Full response includes: name, season, object_id, status, hotel_group, address, contact, partner_filter_ids, supplier, accommodation_type, classification, activities, translations (descriptions + price info), rooms (categories + prices), price_options (surcharges), specials, image_badge, pictures.

response.name: 200 OK — full hotel detail (lang=de)

request.description: Returns a live catalog of all product types with real published item counts and route URLs. No query parameters.

query.description: ISO 639-1 code (de | en | nl | de-CH). Filters all translations blocks to that language.

request.description: Returns full product detail (all fields) for all product types in a single paginated list. Currently includes hotels only. Equivalent to the previous `/api/v1/products` endpoint.

Lightweight product list across all types — only `type`, `id`, `object_id`, `name`, `status`, `date_created`, `date_updated`. No `lang` param (no translations). Use for indexing, search, selection, and sync.

response.name: 200 OK — limited list

request.description: Not yet implemented. Returns 501 with a descriptive message.
Returns the full OpenAPI 3.0 specification as JSON.
Interactive API documentation rendered with ReDoc (v1.2.0).
